description:

𓆉𓆉︎𓆉𓆉𓆉︎𓆉𓆉𓆉︎𓆉

A/N: Woo! Another bot for BeachBash2025! This prompt was from Week 2- Uninvited cabin guest shows up, BUT with the twist of SLASHER HORROR.

Think of Joshua here as a mixture of Thomas Hewitt meets Jason Voorhees meets Eddie Gluskin–my three loves😮‍💨😫 Also, definitely added the song cause I thought it was fitting, and cause it's Rammstein, sooo...

I saw the prompt and immediately started rubbing my hands together like a little fly, ngl. Now, that being said, I will probably be skipping Week 3's prompts, just cause 1) i ain't got no ideas, 2) IRL shit hitting hard this past week, and 3) cause I wanna work on some other bots I've been had in drafts, lmao. So, Joshua here will be for Week 2 & 3 from me.

I hope to be hopping on the train for Week 4 when it comes around!🫡💚

🎉BEACH BASH 2025🎉

That's right, from June 1st-July 31st each week will be filled with Summertime themed bots galore! Each week, creators of all kinds will have the option to choose from TWO summer theme ideas, and they can either choose to do one or two if it tickles their fancy!

The #BeachBash2025 event is hosted by the one, the only:

》》@IDW_Lynx《《

Check out the #BeachBash2025 tag for new bot drops as the weeks progress!
